note: Full 5-minute offer books for a sample day. Each interval is that interval's per-grid supply stack, all resource segments pooled and compacted to at most 48 price blocks (MW-weighted merges), self-scheduled nominations added as a price-taking block at the offer floor (-10.0 PhP/kWh). offers.py keeps only the HH:05 book per hour; this preserves the intra-hour detail that IEMOP's rolling window would otherwise erase.
